item.title: 马斯克诉 OpenAI 案败诉
item.guid: 马斯克诉-OpenAI-案败诉
item.description:
According to CNBC and The Wall Street Journal, a federal jury in Oakland, California, has ruled in Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and its CEO Sam Altman, finding that Musk's claims were beyond the statute of limitations and dismissing all of his assertions. 据 CNBC 和《华尔街日报》报道，美国加利福尼亚州奥克兰联邦陪审团已就埃隆 · 马斯克诉 OpenAI 及其 CEO 山姆 · 奥特曼一案作出裁决，认定马斯克的起诉超出诉讼时效，驳回其全部主张。

The case stemmed from a lawsuit filed by Musk in 2024. He accused OpenAI and Altman of violating a promise to operate the company as a non-profit organization, and stated in court that OpenAI "stole from a charity." 此案源于马斯克 2024 年提起的诉讼。他指控 OpenAI 及奥特曼违背了将该公司作为非营利机构运营的承诺，并在庭审中称 OpenAI「窃取了一家慈善机构」。

The jury's ruling did not judge the merits of the "breach of charitable trust" accusation, but rather found that Musk's lawsuit exceeded the three-year statute of limitations. The court also dismissed related allegations against Microsoft. 陪审团的裁决并未就「违反慈善信托」指控的实质内容作出判断，而是认定马斯克的起诉超过了三年诉讼时效。法院同时驳回了针对微软的相关指控。

After the ruling was announced, Musk posted on the X platform, characterizing the outcome as a "technicality on the calendar" and stating that he would appeal to the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. 裁决宣布后，马斯克在 X 平台发文，将这一结果定性为「日程上的一个技术性问题」，并表示将向第九巡回上诉法院提起上诉。

OpenAI's chief lawyer, William Savitt, stated after the hearing that this "was not a technical ruling, but a substantive one," and claimed Musk was using the lawsuit as a competitive tool. Microsoft also issued a statement welcoming the ruling. OpenAI 首席律师威廉 · 萨维特在庭后表示，这「不是一个技术性裁决，而是一个实质性裁决」，并称马斯克是在将诉讼作为竞争手段使用。微软方面亦发表声明，对裁决表示欢迎。

item.title: 苹果开启 WWDC 邀请，将公布苹果 AI 新进展
item.guid: 苹果开启-WWDC-邀请，将公布苹果-AI-新进展
item.description:
Early this morning, Apple officially launched WWDC26 invitations and announced the detailed schedule. 今天凌晨，苹果正式启动 WWDC26 邀请，并公布详细日程安排。

This year's WWDC conference will be held from June 9th to 13th Beijing time, open to global developers, focusing on showcasing new system capabilities, development tools, and framework updates across Apple's platforms. 本届 WWDC 大会将于北京时间 6 月 9 日至 13 日举行，面向全球开发者开放，重点展示 Apple 各平台的新系统能力、开发工具和框架更新。

According to the schedule, WWDC26 will kick off on June 9th Beijing time, where Apple will hold a keynote speech and Platforms State of the Union, introducing the next generation of software platforms, AI-related advancements, and new tools for developers. 按照安排，WWDC26 将于北京时间 6 月 9 日开幕，届时 Apple 将举行主题演讲和 Platforms State of the Union，介绍新一代软件平台、人工智能相关进展，以及面向开发者的新工具。

During the conference, developers and students can watch over 100 video sessions on tools, technologies, and design, participate in group lab activities, and interact with engineers and community members in the Apple Developer Forums. 大会期间，开发者和学生可以观看超过 100 场围绕工具、技术和设计的视频讲座，参与团体实验室活动，并在 Apple 开发者论坛中与工程师和社区成员交流。

Apple will also invite over 1000 developers, designers, and students to Apple Park on June 9th to participate in a special in-person event. Apple 还将在 6 月 9 日邀请超过 1000 名开发者、设计师和学生前往 Apple Park，参与线下特别活动。

At that time, iFanr will also be at Apple Park, bringing you first-hand live reports. 届时，爱范儿也将在 Apple Park，为大家带来第一手的现场报道。

item.title: 问界 M9 设计师公开点赞理想 L9 内饰：比例和谐，口味控制得恰到好处
item.guid: 问界-M9-设计师公开点赞理想-L9-内饰：比例和谐，口味控制得恰到好处
item.description:
@Zimo-子墨, the designer of the new generation AITO M9 series cars, recently posted on Weibo, praising the interior design of the new Li L9, calling it "simple, logical, harmoniously proportioned, with a clear visual focus, and perfectly controlled taste." 全新一代问界 M9 系列汽车设计师 @Zimo-子墨 日前在微博发文，点赞全新理想 L9 的内饰设计，称其「简洁、逻辑、比例和谐，视觉重心清晰，口味控制得恰到好处」。

He stated that startups, with strong decision-makers, often have deep involvement in design control, which can easily disrupt the overarching design logic; however, by the second and third generation products, regardless of the predecessor's success, teams usually delegate more authority to designers to refine their expression. 他表示，初创公司在有强决策者的情况下，往往对设计管控介入较深，容易打散设计的贯穿逻辑；而到第二代、第三代产品时，无论前代成功与否，团队通常会更多放权给设计师打磨表达。

He also revealed that the interior design director for the new L9 is Chris Lee from BMW, and stated that although both parties have long managed direct competitors, he is "truly delighted by good design, born in China," and has already sent a text message to congratulate him. 他同时透露，新 L9 的内饰设计总监为来自宝马的 Chris Lee，并称虽然双方长期管理直接竞品，但「真的欢喜好设计，生在中国」，并已发短信向对方表示祝贺。

item.title: 国家反诈中心 App 上线「AI 内容鉴定」
item.guid: 国家反诈中心-App-上线「AI-内容鉴定」
item.description:
According to CCTV News, the National Anti-Fraud Center App recently officially launched the "AI Content Identification" feature, which supports AI-generated trace detection for images, videos, audio, and text, primarily used to identify forged content in fraud and e-commerce scenarios. 据央视新闻报道，国家反诈中心 App 近期正式上线「AI 内容鉴定」功能，支持对图像、视频、音频及文本进行 AI 生成痕迹检测，主要用于识别诈骗及电商场景中的伪造内容。

The practice of using AI to tamper with images on e-commerce platforms to defraud "refund only" is becoming increasingly common. CCTV News reporters randomly selected ten suspected AI-generated after-sales images provided by merchants, and after uploading them to the National Anti-Fraud Center App and multiple AI authenticity tools, all were determined to "contain AI-generated traces." 电商平台上利用 AI 篡改图片骗取「仅退款」的行为日趋普遍。央视新闻记者随机选取十张商家提供的疑似 AI 生成售后图，上传至国家反诈中心 App 及多个 AI 鉴真工具后，均被判定为「图像含 AI 生成痕迹」。

According to the introduction, this detection scheme combines small models and large models: the small model learns the generation patterns of AIGC content, while the large model determines whether the content has physical flaws or logical semantic issues, and the two jointly output the final result. 据介绍，该检测方案结合小模型与大模型：小模型学习 AIGC 内容的生成模式，大模型则判断内容是否存在物理瑕疵或逻辑语义问题，二者联合输出最终结果。

item.title: 苹果 Apple Watch 改款在即，独家传感器供应商 TASC 订单有望提前启动
item.guid: 苹果-Apple-Watch-改款在即，独家传感器供应商-TASC-订单有望提前启动
item.description:
According to DIGITIMES, Apple plans a major redesign for high-end Apple Watch models in the second half of this year, with sensor functions simultaneously upgraded. The market expects shipments to increase by 20% to 30% compared to 2025. 据 DIGITIMES 报道，苹果计划于今年下半年对高端 Apple Watch 机型进行重大改款，传感器功能将同步升级，市场预计届时出货量较 2025 年增长 20% 至 30%。

Apple Watch 11 already has blood oxygen, pulse, heart rate, and blood pressure sensing capabilities. The next phase is expected to advance non-invasive blood glucose monitoring, with the specific implementation time depending on FDA approval progress. Apple Watch 11 已具备血氧、脉搏、心率及血压感测能力，下一阶段预计推进无创血糖监测，具体落地时间取决于 FDA 审批进展。

As Apple's exclusive supplier of sensor components, Asia Semiconductor (TASC) is expected to benefit directly. The market anticipates new product orders to start as early as July, driving significantly higher performance in the second half of the year compared to the first half. 作为苹果传感器元件的独家供应商，亚洲半导体（TASC）预计将直接受益。市场预期新品订单最早于 7 月启动，带动下半年业绩明显超越上半年。

item.title: 广汽董事长回应被称网约车之王
item.guid: 广汽董事长回应被称网约车之王
item.description:
According to "Insight Economy," Feng Xingya, Secretary of the Party Committee and Chairman of GAC Group, recently pointed out at the "18th Xuanyuan Automobile Blue Book Forum," regarding the claim of being the "King of Ride-Hailing Cars": 据「睿见 Economy」报道，日前广汽集团党委书记、董事长冯兴亚在「第十八届轩辕汽车蓝皮书论坛」上，针对「网约车之王」的说法，其指出：

Many consumers may not have fully understood one issue: "Ride-hailing cars are means of production." Means of production have extremely high quality requirements because they are tools used to make money. Only cars that can bring more benefits to themselves will be welcomed by users and buyers. 很多消费者可能没有想明白一个问题，「网约车是生产资料」。生产资料对品质的要求极高，因为它是用来挣钱的工具。只有能为自己带来更多利益的车，才能受到使用者和购买者的欢迎。

For drivers, cars need to be "fast, good, and economical" and able to make money. "This is precisely the best validation of quality. Without high quality, it's impossible to be popular among ride-hailing drivers; this is fundamental."

He further analyzed that ride-hailing cars have a very long usage cycle, with drivers potentially spending more than ten hours a day in the car. If comfort is insufficient and fatigue is high, it will not be welcomed by drivers. Furthermore, indicators such as power consumption also determine that ride-hailing drivers are the most demanding group when it comes to cars. 他进一步分析，网约车的乘坐周期非常长，一天可能十几个小时都在车上。如果舒适性不够、疲劳感很强，它也不会受到司机的欢迎。此外，电耗等各项指标，也决定了网约车司机是对车要求最严格的一群人。

Feng Xingya concluded that GAC will extend the experience accumulated from ride-hailing operations to its various brands, making vehicles more reliable, comfortable, and reassuring. "This is precisely where our advantage lies." 冯兴亚总结道，这些从网约车运营中积累下来的经验，广汽会延展到旗下各个品牌，让车辆变得更加可靠、舒适和安心。「这反而是我们的优势所在。」

item.title: 三星良率追赶提速，韩国两大内存厂同步加码 DRAM 产能
item.guid: 三星良率追赶提速，韩国两大内存厂同步加码-DRAM-产能
item.description:
According to DIGITIMES, Samsung Electronics recently significantly improved the yield of its latest DRAM used for High Bandwidth Memory (HBM). The yield for its fifth-generation 10nm-class 1b DRAM has reached 92%, and the yield for its sixth-generation 1c DRAM, used for next-generation HBM4 products, has also exceeded 75%. 据 DIGITIMES 报道，三星电子近期大幅提升了用于高带宽内存（HBM）的最新 DRAM 良率。其第五代 10nm 级 1b DRAM 良率已达 92%，用于下一代 HBM4 产品的第六代 1c DRAM 良率也突破 75%。

The improvement in yield is expected to enhance Samsung's cost competitiveness and boost its ability to mass-supply advanced memory products to major AI customers. 良率的提升有望增强三星的成本竞争力，并提升其向主要 AI 客户大规模供应先进存储产品的能力。

In terms of capacity expansion, according to Ddaily, Samsung and Hynix are simultaneously accelerating factory expansion and equipment orders. Samsung is accelerating DRAM investment in its Pyeongtaek P4 factory, with equipment installation expected to continue until the end of this year, and the market estimates further expansion next year. 在产能扩张方面，据 Ddaily 报道，三星和海力士正同步提前推进工厂扩建和设备订单。三星正加速平泽 P4 工厂的 DRAM 投资，设备安装预计持续至今年底，市场估计明年将进一步扩大投入。

Hynix, meanwhile, is advancing expansion at its Cheongju M15X and Yongin Y1 factories, with industry experts expecting its DRAM-related capital expenditure to double next year compared to this year. 海力士则在清州 M15X 和龙仁 Y1 工厂推进扩产，业界预计其明年 DRAM 相关资本支出有望较今年翻倍。

item.title: 腾讯音乐官宣收购喜马拉雅
item.guid: 腾讯音乐官宣收购喜马拉雅
item.description:
Tencent Music Entertainment Group (TME) announced yesterday that it has officially completed the acquisition of Himalaya, making Himalaya a wholly-owned subsidiary of TME. 腾讯音乐娱乐集团（TME）昨日宣布，已正式完成对喜马拉雅并购交易的交割，喜马拉雅成为 TME 全资子公司。

On the day the transaction was completed, TME Executive Chairman Cussion Pang and CEO Zhu Liang jointly issued an all-staff letter. Management stated that Himalaya is an important builder in China's long-form audio sector, and both parties have highly consistent strategic directions, and will jointly expand the online music and audio industry space after the merger. 交割完成当日，TME 执行董事长彭迦信与 CEO 梁柱联合向全体员工发布全员信。管理层称，喜马拉雅是中国长音频领域的重要建设者，双方战略方向高度一致，合并后将共同拓展在线音乐与音频行业空间。

item.title: 铠侠股价飙升，计划美国上市
item.guid: 铠侠股价飙升，计划美国上市
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Kioxia's stock price rose 16% yesterday, reaching a new high. After the company disclosed stronger-than-expected earnings outlook last week, several Wall Street institutions quickly raised their target prices; at the same time, Kioxia also confirmed it is preparing to issue American Depositary Receipts (ADRs) to enhance liquidity and expand its access to international capital markets. 据彭博社报道，铠侠（Kioxia）股价昨日上涨 16%，创下新高。公司在上周披露强于预期的业绩展望后，多家华尔街机构迅速上调目标价；与此同时，铠侠也确认正准备在美国发行存托凭证，借此提升流动性并扩大国际资本市场接触面。

The report mentioned that Kioxia expects its quarterly operating profit to reach 1.3 trillion yen by June this year, exceeding market average expectations, and its quarterly profit also set a record. Several institutions believe that in the context of tight storage supply and demand driven by AI, the company still has room to further improve free cash flow and shareholder returns. 报道提到，铠侠预计截至今年 6 月的季度营业利润将达到 1.3 万亿日元，高于市场平均预期，季度利润也创下纪录。多家机构认为，在 AI 带动的存储供需紧张环境下，公司仍有进一步提升自由现金流和股东回报的空间。

item.title: 马斯克：SpaceX 很快开始 IPO，拟融资 750 亿美元
item.guid: 马斯克：SpaceX-很快开始-IPO，拟融资-750-亿美元
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Elon Musk stated yesterday during an online video call at the Samson International Smart Mobility Summit that preparations for SpaceX's IPO are underway in Texas, saying that "SpaceX's IPO will begin soon." 据彭博社报道，马斯克昨日在萨姆森国际智能移动峰会线上视频连线时表示，正在德克萨斯州推进 SpaceX 上市准备，称「SpaceX 的 IPO 事宜将很快开始」。

Insiders revealed that SpaceX could submit its IPO application documents as early as this week, planning to raise up to $75 billion, with a target valuation exceeding $2 trillion. If successful, it would become the largest IPO in history. 知情人士透露，SpaceX 最快本周提交 IPO 申请文件，计划融资最高 750 亿美元，目标估值超 2 万亿美元，若成功将成为史上规模最大的 IPO。

item.title: 百度一季度营收 320.75 亿元，AI 新业务收入首次占一般性业务过半
item.guid: 百度一季度营收-320.75-亿元，AI-新业务收入首次占一般性业务过半
item.description:
Baidu yesterday released its Q1 FY2026 earnings, achieving total operating revenue of 32.075 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 1.16%; net profit attributable to the parent company was 3.445 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 55.36%; and operating cash flow was 2.7 billion yuan. 百度昨日发布 2026 财年第一财季业绩，期内实现营业总收入 320.75 亿元，同比下降 1.16%；归母净利润 34.45 亿元，同比下降 55.36%；经营现金流为 27 亿元。

Specifically, Baidu's core AI new business revenue reached 13.6 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 49%, accounting for over half of Baidu's general business revenue for the first time; among these, smart cloud infrastructure revenue was 8.8 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 79%, and GPU cloud revenue increased by 184% year-on-year. 具体来看，百度核心 AI 新业务收入达到 136 亿元，同比增长 49%，首次占百度一般性业务收入比重超过一半；其中智能云基础设施收入 88 亿元，同比增长 79%，GPU 云收入同比增长 184%。

Luobo Kuaipao's fully driverless autonomous driving operation orders reached 3.2 million in the first quarter, with total orders increasing by over 120% year-on-year. As of May this year, its global business has covered 27 cities, with cumulative autonomous driving mileage exceeding 330 million kilometers. 萝卜快跑在一季度的全无人自动驾驶运营订单达到 320 万单，总订单量同比增长超过 120%，截至今年 5 月其全球业务已覆盖 27 个城市，累计自动驾驶里程超过 3.3 亿公里。

item.title: 爱奇艺一季度由盈转亏 2.95 亿元
item.guid: 爱奇艺一季度由盈转亏-2.95-亿元
item.description:
iQiyi yesterday released its Q1 FY2026 earnings, achieving total operating revenue of 6.226 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 13%; net profit attributable to the parent company turned from profit to loss of 295 million yuan, compared to a profit of 182 million yuan in the same period last year; and operating cash flow was 186 million yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 45.13%. By business segment: 爱奇艺昨日发布 2026 财年第一财季业绩，期内实现营业总收入 62.26 亿元，同比下降 13%；归母净利润由盈转亏 2.95 亿元，去年同期为盈利 1.82 亿元；经营现金流为 1.86 亿元，同比下降 45.13%。分业务看：

  • Member services revenue was 4.2 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 5%; 会员服务收入为 42 亿元，同比下降 5%；
  • Online advertising services revenue was 1.24 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 7%; 在线广告服务收入 12.4 亿元，同比下降 7%；
  • Content distribution revenue was 359 million yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 43%; other revenue was 427 million yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 49%. 内容发行收入 3.59 亿元，同比下降 43%；其他收入 4.27 亿元，同比下降 49%。

The company mentioned in its financial report that popular dramas continue to drive sequential growth in membership revenue, overseas business maintains steady growth, and it plans to leverage AI to reduce content production costs . 公司在财报中提到，热门剧集仍推动会员收入环比增长，海外业务保持稳健增长，并 计划借助AI降低内容制作成本 。

item.title: 荣耀机器人「闪电」「元气仔」走进南大
item.guid: 荣耀机器人「闪电」「元气仔」走进南大
item.description:
On May 17, Honor, with its self-developed robots "Lightning" and "Yuanqizai," conducted an embodied AI popular science activity at Nanjing University, simultaneously showcasing the core imaging features of the new Honor 600 series products. 5 月 17 日，荣耀携自研机器人「闪电」与「元气仔」在南京大学开展具身智能科普活动，并同步展示荣耀 600 系列新品的核心影像功能。

At the event, Honor showcased the core movement and interaction capabilities of its self-developed robots. 活动现场，荣耀展示了自研机器人的核心运动与交互能力。

The robot "Lightning," equipped with a high-dynamic motion system and supporting autonomous perception navigation and high-speed obstacle avoidance, conducted 8 rounds of 1V5 sprint tests with students; another robot, "Yuanqizai," completed complex dance demonstrations, including the "moonwalk," and human-robot interaction. 搭载高动态运动系统、支持自主感知导航与高速避障的机器人「闪电」与在校学生进行了 8 轮 1V5 短跑测试；另一款机器人「元气仔」则完成了包含「太空步」在内的复杂舞蹈动作演示与人机互动。

Concurrently, Honor set up a new product experience zone at the event, prominently featuring the Honor 600 series smartphones. Official information indicates that this model emphasizes AI capabilities based on the Magic OS system and the 4K Live Photo dynamic photo function. 同期，荣耀在现场设立了新品体验区，重点展示荣耀 600 系列智能手机。官方信息显示，该机型主打基于 Magic OS 系统的 AI 能力及 4K Live Photo 动态照片功能。

In terms of appearance, the Honor 600 series has currently announced four color options: "Lucky Star," "Green Apple," "Light Feather Blue," and "Obsidian Black." Among them, the flagship color "Lucky Star" features the industry's first dual magnetic attraction process. 外观方面，荣耀 600 系列目前已公布「幸运星」「青苹果」「光羽蓝」和「曜石黑」四款配色，其中主打配色「幸运星」采用了行业首创的双重磁吸工艺。

item.title: 💡 前 SpaceX 工程师驻扎深圳 8 周后：想做硬件创业，现在就飞过去
item.guid: 💡-前-SpaceX-工程师驻扎深圳-8-周后：想做硬件创业，现在就飞过去
item.description:
Zac Valles, a former engineer with Tesla's autonomous driving and SpaceX's Raptor engine teams, flew directly to Shenzhen 72 hours after YC Demo Day, and returned to San Francisco with new hardware after an 8-week stay. 前 Tesla 无人驾驶与 SpaceX 猛禽发动机团队工程师 Zac Valles 在 YC Demo Day 结束 72 小时后直飞深圳，驻扎 8 周后携新硬件返回旧金山。

He then posted a long thread on X, advising anyone interested in hardware entrepreneurship: regardless of whether you have funding, a team, or even a startup idea, you should go to Shenzhen immediately. 他随后在 X 上发布了一篇长帖，向所有有意从事硬件创业的人发出忠告：不论有没有融资、团队甚至创业想法，都应该立刻去深圳。

If you have even the slightest idea of starting a hardware company, go to Shenzhen. Before funding, before forming a team, before having an idea, before quitting your job – these are not excuses. Just go.

Regarding entering the supply chain, Valles advises entrepreneurs to plan their trip around a large industry exhibition, using it as a springboard to connect with factories. 在切入供应链的路径上，Valles 建议创业者围绕一场大型行业展会安排行程，将其作为接触工厂的跳板。

He also suggested reserving 4 to 6 hours for an on-site visit to Huaqiangbei, calling it a "micro-city" where robot sub-components, batteries, chassis, and electronic components are all concentrated in dedicated buildings. 他还建议在华强北预留 4 到 6 小时实地走访，称其为一座「微型城市」，机器人子组件、电池、底盘、电子元器件均有专属楼栋聚集。

item.title: 小米 YU7 GT 定档周四发布
item.guid: 小米-YU7-GT-定档周四发布
item.description:
Yesterday, Xiaomi officially announced that it will hold a comprehensive human-car-home ecosystem new product launch event on May 21 (this Thursday), where new products such as the Xiaomi YU7 GT and Xiaomi 17 Max will be unveiled: 昨日，小米正式宣布，将于 5 月 21 日（本周四）举行人车家全生态新品发布会，届时将发布小米 YU7 GT、小米 17 Max 等新品：

    Xiaomi YU7 GT: Positioned as a sports car-grade SUV, with a maximum horsepower of 1003ps, a top speed of 300km/h, and a CLTC pure electric range of 705km;

    Xiaomi 17 Max: Features a 6.9-inch ultra-narrow four-equal-bezel flat screen, equipped with a Leica 200-megapixel main camera and an 8000 mAh Jinshajiang battery;

    Xiaomi Band 10 Pro: Thinnest at 9.7 mm, lightest at 21.6 g, with a battery life of up to 21 days;

    Xiaomi's first ear-clip headphones: Weigh 5.5 g per unit, support LHDC 5.0.

item.title: 5499 元起，红魔 11S Pro 系列发布
item.guid: 5499-元起，红魔-11S-Pro-系列发布
item.description:
Red Magic officially launched the Red Magic 11S Pro series yesterday, featuring the domestic debut of the fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 Leading Edition, with a maximum clock speed of 4.74GHz, equipped with the self-developed Red Core R4 gaming chip and CUBE Sky-pillar Game Engine 3.0. 红魔昨日正式发布红魔 11S Pro 系列，国内首发第五代骁龙 8 至尊领先版，最高主频 4.74GHz，配备自研红芯 R4 电竞芯片与 CUBE 擎天游戏引擎 3.0。

    Equipped with the fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 Leading Edition, with a maximum clock speed of 4.74GHz, and the self-developed Red Core R4 gaming chip;

    6.85-inch Wukong Screen 2.0 true full-screen display with no punch-hole, 95.3% screen-to-body ratio, 1.5K resolution, 144Hz high refresh rate, and a 16-megapixel under-screen front camera;

    ICE Magic Cooling System, Wind Control 4.0 active fan (24000r/min), 4D Ice-step VC, Composite Liquid Metal 3.0; Pro+ additionally features a Pulsating Water Cooling Engine, forming a dual air-water cooling system;

    Pro is equipped with an 8000mAh battery + 80W fast charging; Pro+ is equipped with a 7500mAh battery + 120W fast charging + 80W wireless charging;

    3000Hz instant touch sampling rate, 520Hz touch shoulder buttons;

    Built-in PC emulator, supporting Steam account and save file interoperability, and compatible with external gamepads, keyboards, mice, and monitors.

Regarding pricing, the Red Magic 11S Pro 12GB + 256GB is priced at 5499 yuan, with a starting price of 4999 yuan after national subsidies; the Red Magic 11S Pro+ starts at 6199 yuan, and the top-tier 16GB+1TB model is priced at 7999 yuan. 价格方面，红魔 11S Pro 12GB + 256GB 售价 5499 元，叠加国补后到手价 4999 元起；红魔 11S Pro+ 起售价 6199 元，最高配 16GB+1TB 售价 7999 元。

This press conference also introduced several new ecosystem products: the Red Magic Carbon Fiber Gaming Mouse GS09, with an initial sale price of 999 yuan; new colorways for the Red Magic Cooler 8 Pro and its accompanying live streaming stand; and the official announcement of the Red Magic Gaming Tablet 5 Pro, set to be released in June. 本次发布会还带来多款生态新品：红魔碳纤维游戏鼠标 GS09，首销价 999 元、红魔散热器 8 Pro 新配色及配套直播支架，以及官宣将于 6 月发布的红魔游戏平板 5 Pro。

item.title: 宝马摩托发布 Vision K18 概念车，用直列六缸重讲巡航性能叙事
item.guid: 宝马摩托发布-Vision-K18-概念车，用直列六缸重讲巡航性能叙事
item.description:
BMW Motorrad recently unveiled the Vision K18 concept bike at the Concorso d'Eleganza Villa d'Este in Italy. The official definition for it is a "one-off vision bike," meaning a unique concept piece created solely to express a design direction, with a focus on re-organizing the entire vehicle's language around performance, luxury, and long-distance cruising experience. 宝马摩托车日前在意大利埃斯特庄园古董车展发布 Vision K18 概念车。官方将其定义为一台 one-off vision bike，也就是只为表达设计方向而打造的单件概念作品，重点围绕性能、豪华感和长途巡航体验重新组织整车语言。

The most core element of this vehicle is an 1800cc inline-six engine. BMW states that the entire vehicle's proportions were almost reverse-engineered from this powertrain: the slender body silhouette references the streamlines of high-speed aircraft, while the front and rear intentionally emphasize six-cylinder identification, including six intake channels, six exhaust tailpipes, and six sets of LED light clusters. 这款车最核心的元素，是一台 1800cc 直列六缸发动机。宝马表示，整车比例几乎从这套动力总成反推而来：细长车身轮廓参考了高速飞机的飞线，车头与车尾则刻意强化六缸识别，包括六个进气通道、六根排气尾管和六组 LED 灯组。

The official statement also mentioned that the Vision K18 incorporates numerous hand-formed aluminum body parts and includes mechanical details such as hydraulically lowerable suspension, with the goal of making the technological presence a direct visual protagonist. 官方同时提到，Vision K18 采用了大量手工成型铝制车身部件，并加入可液压降低的悬架等机械细节，目标是把技术存在感直接做成视觉主角。

item.title: 曝 OpenAI 正为 Codex 内测实时语音模式，前台连麦与后台写代码分离
item.guid: 曝-OpenAI-正为-Codex-内测实时语音模式，前台连麦与后台写代码分离
item.description:
Developer @DevAdventur3s recently stated that they unearthed 1536 lines of unactivated Rust code from the OpenAI Codex codebase, indicating that Codex is testing a real-time voice mode. 开发者 @DevAdventur3s 近日表示，自己从 OpenAI Codex 代码库中挖出了 1536 行尚未激活的 Rust 代码，显示 Codex 正在测试实时语音模式。

According to their statement, this solution completely separates interaction from execution: after a user issues complex programming tasks via voice, the frontend calls a voice model codenamed gpt-realtime-1.5 to communicate progress with the user in real-time via WebRTC, while the actual file modification, code generation, and testing are silently completed by another, larger model in the backend. 按照其说法，这套方案把交互与执行彻底分开：用户通过语音下达复杂编程任务后，前台会调用代号为 gpt-realtime-1.5 的语音模型，通过 WebRTC 实时与用户沟通进度，而真正的文件修改、代码生成和测试则交由后台另一套更大的模型静默完成。

item.title: 从客厅到办公室，摩尔线程发布四大场景下的 AI 应用方案
item.guid: 从客厅到办公室，摩尔线程发布四大场景下的-AI-应用方案
item.description:
Yesterday, Moore Threads, at its 2026 product launch event, showcased AI application solutions across four major scenarios, centered around its self-developed "Yangtze" SoC and full-featured GPU, with MTT AICUBE and MTT AIBOOK as core platforms. 昨天，摩尔线程在 2026 产品发布会上，围绕自研「长江」SoC 与全功能 GPU，以 MTT AICUBE 和 MTT AIBOOK 为核心载体，集中展示了四大场景下的 AI 应用方案。

    Living Room: MTT AICUBE supports voice-on-demand, itinerary planning, digital avatar generation, and Android mobile game operation, positioning itself as a home AI computing hub. Moore Threads states that this move fills a gap in the application of domestic GPUs in the Android ecosystem on the client side.

    Study: Introduced AI programming agent MUSACODE, providing operator generation and automated migration functions for the MUSA ecosystem; the edge-cloud collaborative programming tool InfCode is deeply adapted to MTT AIBOOK, handling sensitive data locally and calling cloud resources as needed for complex tasks.

    Classroom: Demonstrated three applications: AI shorthand, an emotional and cognitive intelligence platform (based on relevant laboratory technology from Peking University, supporting offline deployment), and the Digital National Museum, all running locally on MTT AIBOOK's edge computing power.

    Office: MTT AIBOOK supports single-machine five-screen expansion; the embodied simulation platform RaysTwins can adapt to scenarios such as industrial inspection and autonomous driving; robot dogs equipped with MTT E300 support autonomous navigation driven by voice commands via IM software; Moore Threads also partnered with SiliconFlow to launch large model inference services, claiming support for scaling from thousands to tens of thousands of cards.

item.title: 豆包上线博物馆讲解模式
item.guid: 豆包上线博物馆讲解模式
item.description:
ByteDance's Doubao officially launched its museum explanation mode yesterday. By clicking the "Museum Explanation" button within the Doubao App's dialogue box, users can initiate a video call explanation. 字节跳动旗下豆包昨日正式上线博物馆讲解模式，点击豆包 App 对话框内的「博物馆讲解」按钮，即可开启视频通话讲解。

After aiming at an exhibit, the system automatically identifies it and provides personalized introductions, supporting continuous, proactive explanations without the need for item-by-item questioning. This official collaboration covers over 20 museums and art galleries, including the National Museum of China, Capital Museum, National Art Museum of China, Gansu Provincial Museum, Hebei Museum, and Pudong Art Museum, among others. 对准展品后，系统自动识别并提供个性化介绍，支持连续主动讲解，无需逐件提问。此次官方合作覆盖超过 20 家博物馆、美术馆，包括中国国家博物馆、首都博物馆、中国美术馆、甘肃省博物馆、河北博物院及浦东美术馆等。

item.title: 腾讯混元发布业界首个七字体汉字 OCR 评测基准 Chronicles-OCR
item.guid: 腾讯混元发布业界首个七字体汉字-OCR-评测基准-Chronicles-OCR
item.description:
Tencent Hunyuan, in collaboration with SSV Digital Culture Lab, Anyang Normal University's Key Laboratory of Oracle Bone Inscription Information Processing, the Institute of Information Engineering of the Chinese Academy of Sciences, and Nankai University, yesterday released Chronicles-OCR, the industry's first ancient character recognition evaluation benchmark covering the complete evolutionary trajectory of the "Seven Transformations of Chinese Characters." 腾讯混元昨日联合 SSV 数字文化实验室、安阳师范学院甲骨文信息处理重点实验室、中科院信工所、南开大学，发布 Chronicles-OCR，这是业界首个覆盖汉字「七体之变」完整演化轨迹的古文字识别评测基准。

The dataset includes 2,800 expert-annotated images (400 for each font type) and is designed for four core evaluation tasks: 数据集包含 2,800 张专家标注图像（每种字体各 400 张），设计四项核心评测任务：

    Cross-era character detection: End-to-end localization and interpretation, using H-mean as the metric.

    Fine-grained ancient character recognition: Isolating pure glyph mapping through a visual referring mechanism, using Exact Match as the metric.

    Ancient text transcription: Covering all seven font types, using Normalized Edit Distance (NED) as the metric.

    Font classification: macro font style discrimination, with accuracy as the metric

Evaluation results for 28 mainstream models show that current VLLMs have systemic shortcomings in ancient text recognition: GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro, and other models have an H-mean close to 0 in cross-era character detection tasks, with the strongest model only reaching 16.5; even after character regions are labeled, the highest recognition accuracy is only 27.1%. 对 28 个主流模型的评测结果显示，当前 VLLM 在古文字识别上存在系统性短板：GPT-5、Gemini 2.5 Pro 等模型在跨时代字符检测任务上 H-mean 接近 0，最强模型仅 16.5；即便标注字符区域后，识别准确率最高也只有 27.1%。

item.title: 腾讯推出 AI 设计智能体 Ardot
item.guid: 腾讯推出-AI-设计智能体-Ardot
item.description:
Yesterday, Tencent launched the public beta of its self-developed AI design agent platform, Ardot. This platform connects structured design data directly to external IDEs via MCP (Model Context Protocol), streamlining the design-to-code delivery process. New registered users can receive an initial allowance of 1000 Credits during the public beta. 昨天，腾讯开启自研 AI 设计智能体平台 Ardot 公测，该平台通过 MCP（模型上下文协议）将设计稿结构化数据直接连接外部 IDE，打通设计到代码的交付流程。公测期间新注册用户可获得 1000 Credits 初始额度。

    Supports batch generation or modification of vector interfaces using natural language, covering APP pages, official websites, posters, icons, etc.;

    Can import Figma files, fully preserving original layouts, styles, and components;

    Open access to enterprise private business component libraries, ensuring AI-generated content complies with team standards;

    Design variables, components, and layout data can be read by tools like CodeBuddy, Cursor, and Claude Code via the MCP protocol, supporting one-click front-end code generation;

    Supports multi-person online real-time comments, annotation feedback, and version comparison.

item.title: LINLEE 林里官宣蔡徐坤为全球品牌代言人
item.guid: LINLEE-林里官宣蔡徐坤为全球品牌代言人
item.description:
Recently, hand-shaken lemon tea brand LINLEE officially announced Cai Xukun as its global brand ambassador. 近日，手打柠檬茶品牌 LINLEE 林里正式宣布蔡徐坤担任全球品牌代言人。

Coinciding with the official announcement of the brand ambassador, LINLEE launched an upgrade to its signature hand-shaken lemon tea product, simultaneously releasing "Starlight Shimmering Golden Duck" merchandise and a brand ambassador surprise gift box. 在代言人官宣的同期，林里推出了招牌手打柠檬茶的产品升级，并同步发售「星光熠彩鎏金鸭」周边及代言人惊喜礼盒。

item.title: 瑞幸咖啡上线含酒精饮品
item.guid: 瑞幸咖啡上线含酒精饮品
item.description:
According to Dahe Finance Cube, Luckin Coffee recently launched two new specialty drinks: one is an alcoholic beverage called "Crimson Moonlight," and the other is the newly introduced "Cocoa Vienna." 据大河财立方报道，瑞幸咖啡日前上线两款特调新品，其中一款为含酒精饮品「绯色月光」，另一款为全新推出的「可可维也纳」。

"Crimson Moonlight" was previously only available for a limited time at Luckin Lab stores, and is now officially launched nationwide. According to the Luckin Coffee mini-program, the drink has an alcohol content of >0.5%vol and is limited to dine-in. 「绯色月光」此前仅在瑞幸 lab 店限定发售，此次正式面向全国落地。据瑞幸咖啡小程序显示，该饮品酒精度 >0.5%vol，为堂食限定。

Luckin Coffee stated that the nationwide launch of these specialty products is an active response to market consumer demand. 瑞幸咖啡方面表示，本次特调产品的全国落地是对市场消费需求的积极响应。

item.title: 国内首批 103 号赛级汽油量产，环塔拉力赛率先投入使用
item.guid: 国内首批-103-号赛级汽油量产，环塔拉力赛率先投入使用
item.description:
According to CCTV News, China's first batch of industrially produced 103-octane racing gasoline was officially put into use during this year's Taklimakan Rally for cars and motorcycles. This product, independently developed by China, fills the gap in domestic high-performance racing fuel and ends the long-standing reliance on imports for top-tier racing oil. 据央视新闻报道，在今年环塔克拉玛干汽车摩托车越野拉力赛中，国内首批工业化生产的 103 号赛级汽油正式投入使用。这一产品由我国自主研发，填补了国内高性能赛车燃油的空白，结束了顶级赛事用油长期依赖进口的局面。

The 103-octane racing gasoline has a research octane number (RON) of over 103, which can effectively reduce the risk of knocking in racing engines under high compression and heavy load conditions, while also possessing high combustion efficiency and clean environmental characteristics. This product is specifically developed for the extreme conditions of high-speed, heavy-load racing and is not suitable for ordinary household cars. 103 号赛级汽油的研究法辛烷值达 103 以上，可有效降低赛车发动机在高压缩比、高负荷工况下的爆震风险，兼具高燃烧效率与清洁环保特性。该产品专为赛车高转速、大负荷的极端工况开发，不适用于普通家用车。

CCTV News advises that household cars should choose 92 or 95 octane gasoline according to their manuals, while high-performance models like those with turbochargers can opt for 95 or 98 octane. A higher octane rating does not necessarily mean benefits for all car models. 央视新闻提示，家用车按说明书选择 92 号或 95 号汽油即可，涡轮增压等高性能车型可选 95 号或 98 号，更高牌号并不意味着对所有车型都有益处。

item.title: 外星人题材科幻惊悚新片《希望》首曝预告
item.guid: 外星人题材科幻惊悚新片《希望》首曝预告
item.description:
According to blogger "Watchmen Hollywood," the first trailer for "Hope," a new alien-themed sci-fi thriller directed by South Korean director Na Hong-jin (known for "The Wailing," "The Yellow Sea," "The Chaser"), has been released. 据博主「守望好莱坞」消息，韩国导演罗泓轸（代表作《哭声》《黄海》《追击者》）执导的外星人题材科幻惊悚新片《希望》日前释出首支预告。

The film's story takes place in a remote town called "Hope Port" near the Demilitarized Zone (DMZ). Initially, local rumors of a tiger's appearance alert Sheriff Bum-seok and throw the town's community into chaos. As events unfold, a deeper, more inexplicable mystery gradually surfaces, forcing the town's residents to confront an unknown threat. 影片故事发生在非军事区（DMZ）附近一个名为「希望港」的偏远小镇。起初，当地传言出现了一只老虎，引发警长 Bum-seok 的警觉，并导致镇内社群陷入混乱。随着事件发展，一个更深层、更难以解释的谜团逐渐浮出水面，迫使小镇居民正面应对未知威胁。

item.title: 《小马宝莉：新世代》发布定档预告，5 月 30 日重映
item.guid: 《小马宝莉：新世代》发布定档预告，5-月-30-日重映
item.description:
My Little Pony: A New Generation announced that it will be re-released on May 30th, with pre-sales opening simultaneously. 《小马宝莉：新世代》宣布将于 5 月 30 日重映，并同步开启预售。

The film's story unfolds around Equestria—after magic disappeared, the Earth Ponies, Unicorns, and Pegasi were isolated from each other. Young Earth Pony Sunny Starscout is determined to bring magic back, leading Izzy, Pipp, Zipp, and Hitch on an adventure of unity and restoration. 影片故事围绕小马利亚展开——魔法消失后，陆马、独角兽与飞马三族彼此隔绝，年轻陆马希悦决心重新找回魔法，带领小艺、琪琪、力力、英奇踏上团结与修复的冒险旅程。
